policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-agw-05 - WAF policy state'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Application+Gateway#IncidentremediationApplicationGateway#drcp-agw-05 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Application Gateway Web Application Firewall prevent disablement
policyDefinition.description: This policy enforces that the Web Application Firewall on the Application Gateway can't be disabled.

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Deny, Audit or Disabled.
